title: In-syringe automated extraction of selected antibiotics in surface waters exploring deep eutectic solvent coupled online to HPLC analysis
author: Antos, Joanna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These data are related to the experiments performed for the extraction of antibiotics from water samples based on a newly developed automated extraction methodology and related instrumental setup.
steps_raw: These data are related to the experiments performed for the extraction of antibiotics from water samples based on a newly developed automated extraction methodology and related instrumental setup.
